about.title: About RailMate Bangladesh
about.mission_desc: To simplify and improve the Bangladesh Railway experience through unified, intelligent, community-powered tools — without replacing existing government services.
about.reliability_desc: We strive to provide the most accurate and up-to-date information possible through official data and community verification.
about.community_desc: RailMate is built for travelers, by travelers. We believe in the power of shared information to improve everyone's journey.
about.privacy_desc: Your data is yours. We collect only what's necessary to provide our service and never compromise your personal information.
about.vision: "RailMate Bangladesh is the most trusted railway companion app for Bangladeshi travelers — the app they open before, during, and after every train journey."
about.why_exists_p1: For years, Bangladeshi train travelers have navigated a fragmented landscape of information. Official schedules were often hard to find on mobile, real-time delay information was non-existent except at station platforms, and there was no unified way for passengers to help each other.
about.why_exists_p2: Existing apps often lacked a modern user experience, didn't support iOS, or didn't provide a community layer that reflected the real-time reality of the tracks. We saw a need for a new standard — a companion that feels like it belongs in 2025.
about.independent_platform: RailMate is an independent platform developed by Bangladeshi developers. It is not affiliated with Bangladesh Railway.

about_section.headline: Created by travelers, for travelers.
about_section.para1: RailMate was born out of a simple frustration: it shouldn't be this hard to find a train. We started as a small side project to help friends find schedules on their phones, and we're building it into a community platform for travelers across Bangladesh.
about_section.para2: We believe that access to public transport information is a right, not a luxury. That's why RailMate is independent, community-driven, and free for the core features that matter most.
about_section.legal_note: RailMate is an independent platform and is not affiliated with Bangladesh Railway or any government entity.

business_section.headline: Unlock more with RailMate for Business.
business_section.subheadline: Whether you're a transport logistics firm, a media outlet, or a corporate travel department, our data and platform can help you scale.
business_section.card1_body: Integrate real-time community delay data and verified schedules into your own internal apps or customer-facing dashboards.
business_section.card2_body: Provide your employees with RailMate Pro features to ensure they are always on time and informed during business travel.
business_section.card3_body: Reach thousands of travelers exactly when they are planning their journeys. Hyper-local, context-aware advertising that works.

legal_section.company_statement: RailMate is a project dedicated to improving public transport accessibility in Bangladesh. All trademarks are property of their respective owners.
legal_section.data_note: Schedule and fare data is sourced from official publications and community reports. While we strive for accuracy, users should always verify with official station boards.

pricing_section.headline: A plan for every traveler.
pricing_section.subheadline: Start for free and upgrade when you need more power. No hidden fees.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about RailMate Bangladesh.
faq.no_answer_text: If you couldn't find the answer you're looking for, please contact our support team.

questions.question: Is RailMate free to use?
questions.answer: Yes, the core app is completely free — schedules, fares, saved routes, community reports, and delay alerts are all free. We offer an optional RailMate Pro subscription (৳99/month or ৳799/year) for advanced features.

questions.question: How accurate is the schedule information?
questions.answer: Schedule data is sourced from official Bangladesh Railway publications and is reviewed regularly. Every train listing shows a "last verified" date so you always know how current the information is. Schedules can change without notice from Bangladesh Railway — for time-critical travel, confirm with the station or official channels before departure.

questions.question: Does RailMate sell train tickets?
questions.answer: No. RailMate does not process ticket sales or payments of any kind for train tickets. We link directly to the official Rail Sheba app/website for ticket purchases. RailMate is an independent information and community platform, not a ticketing service.

questions.question: How do community reports work?
questions.answer: Any registered user can submit a delay, crowding, or condition report for any train. Reports are validated through a community upvote/confirm system. Reports with multiple confirmations are ranked higher.

questions.question: Is RailMate affiliated with Bangladesh Railway?
questions.answer: No. RailMate is an independent platform built by Bangladeshi developers. We use publicly available schedule data from Bangladesh Railway's official publications. We are not officially affiliated unless a formal partnership is announced.

train_schedules.title: Train Schedules
train_schedules.body: Full timetables for all Bangladesh Railway intercity routes. Updated when BR updates. Always with last-verified date shown.

fare_calculator.title: Fare Calculator
fare_calculator.body: Exact fares for all 8 coach classes — Shovon to AC Berth. Pick your route, pick your class. No more PDF digging.

live_reports.title: Live Delay Reports
live_reports.body: Fellow travelers report delays, crowding, and coach conditions in real time. Know what's happening before you leave home.

alerts.title: Departure Alerts
alerts.body: Get a push notification before your train departs. Never miss your Dhaka–Chittagong express again.

offline.title: Offline Access
offline.body: Full schedule data cached on your device. Works in stations with no signal. Works on overnight journeys with no data.

localization.title: Bengali & English
localization.body: Station names, train names, all UI in both languages. Switch any time. Noto Sans Bengali for proper rendering.

metadata.title: RailMate Bangladesh
metadata.description: Real train schedules, live delay reports, and fare calculator for Bangladesh Railway. Free. Bengali & English. Works offline.

features_page.title: Every Feature You Need for Better Train Travel

features.name: Train Schedules
features.desc: Browse full Bangladesh Railway timetable by route or station. Search by departure, arrival, or train name. Bilingual display ensures accessibility for everyone.

features.name: Fare Lookup
features.desc: View fare matrix across all 8 seat classes (Shovon, Shovon Chair, Snigdha, AC Berth, AC Seat, First Berth, First Seat, AC S Chair). No more surprises at the counter.

features.name: Saved Routes
features.desc: Bookmark your most-used routes for one-tap access. Your daily commute info is always just a second away, even on the go.

features.name: Journey Planning
features.desc: Plan multi-leg journeys with transfer suggestions. Find the most efficient way to reach your destination with smart connection logic.

features.name: Community Delay Reports
features.desc: Real-time user-submitted delay reports. Upvote system ensures reliability and accuracy through collective intelligence from fellow passengers.

features.name: Crowding Reports
features.desc: Know how packed your train is before boarding. Community-shared data helps you decide whether to wait for the next one or find a better coach.

features.name: Delay Notifications & Alerts
features.desc: Get push alerts for your saved routes. Powered by community reports, these alerts keep you informed about delays before you leave home.

features.name: Train Condition Reports
features.desc: Cleanliness, AC status, toilet status — community reported. Choose the best trains based on recent passenger experiences.

features.name: Station Info
features.desc: Platform numbers, facilities, nearby transport links. Navigate complex stations like a pro with detailed local information.

features.name: Premium Features (RailMate Pro)
features.desc: Offline maps, priority alerts, ad-free experience, and advanced journey analytics. Support the mission while getting the ultimate companion experience.

problem_section.tagline: RailMate fixes all three. For free.

pain_points.title: Is my train even on time?
pain_points.body: You leave home, reach the station, and only then find out your train is delayed 45 minutes. No app warned you. No one knew.

pain_points.title: 3 apps for 1 journey
pain_points.body: BR website for schedules. Shohoz for tickets. WhatsApp groups for delay news. There's no single place that does everything.

pain_points.title: What does this ticket actually cost?
pain_points.body: Fare tables are buried in PDFs. Prices differ by class, season, and nobody tells you that Snigdha isn't available on this route.

why_railmate.headline: Built for how Bangladeshis actually travel.
why_railmate.subheadline: Other tools are generic. RailMate was designed from day one for Bangladesh Railway's specific routes, classes, and realities.

differentiators.title: Offline-first architecture
differentiators.body: We cache the entire BR schedule to your device on install. No signal? No problem. Your 3am platform change at Akhaura still works.

differentiators.title: Community over automation
differentiators.body: We don't pretend to have a real-time BR API — it doesn't exist. Instead we rely on real travelers who are on those trains right now.

differentiators.title: Bengali is first-class
differentiators.body: Station names in Bengali aren't an afterthought. Noto Sans Bengali renders every district and junction name the way it should look.

differentiators.title: Honest about data limits
differentiators.body: We show the last-verified date on every schedule. We never present stale data as live. You always know what you can trust.

stats_section.notice: Schedule data is sourced from Bangladesh Railway official publications (railway.gov.bd) and community-verified. Always confirm critical journeys with official sources. Live delay data is community-reported.

benefits.title: Bengali & English
benefits.desc: Native support for both languages across the entire app.

benefits.title: Fare Calculator
benefits.desc: Exact fares across all 8 coach classes — Shovon to AC Berth — for any route.
